javax.swing.plaf.multi/MultiLookAndFeel/.name: createUIs
signatures: public static ComponentUI createUIs(ComponentUI mui, Vector<ComponentUI> uis, JComponent target)

description.en: Creates theComponentUIobjects required to present thetargetcomponent, placing the objects in theuisvector and returning theComponentUIobject that best represents the component's UI.
